identity.name: Fab Luxe by Forbes Global Properties
identity.mission: Create a digital experience that feels like a private viewing of a masterpiece. Old Money sophistication meets modern technical precision.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero headlines, and major value propositions.

body.usage: Paragraphs, lists, button text, and technical details.

accents.usage: Testimonials, 'Quiet Luxury' tagline, and decorative subheads.

primary.name: Deep Emerald
primary.usage: Primary buttons (hover), active states, footer background.

secondary.name: Forbes Gold
secondary.usage: Borders, icons, thin lines, text highlights.

rules: Use 'Forbes Gold' sparingly - only for emphasis.
Text on Dark Green must be Warm Cream (#FDFBF7), never pure white.

HeroSection.structure: Full-screen parallax image with dark overlay (40%). Centered majestic typography. 'Inquire Now' button with gold border.
HeroSection.animation: Slow zoom on background image. Text fade-in stagger.

LeadFormPopup.customization: Remove default radius. Use sharp corners or 2px radius. Gold border on focus. Background: Warm Cream.
LeadFormPopup.success_state: Show elegant success message with checkmark icon, no redirect.

items.title: Forbes Branded
items.desc: India's first Forbes Global Properties project.

content_data.project_name: Fab Luxe by Forbes Global Properties
usps: India's First Forbes Branded Residential Project

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Playfair Display' from Google Fonts via import in index.css.
Ensure the Lead Form sends data to POST /api/leads (mock it if backend not ready, but user said backend exists).
Ensure mobile responsiveness: Text should not be too small (<16px) or too large (>40px) on mobile.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients on dark colors.
